LAW AND MOTION 301, RESPONDENT FINANCIAL EXIT PLANNING, INCORPORATED'S PETITION TO VACATE OR CORRECT ARBITRATION IS DENIED. THE COURT DOES NOT REVIEW AN ARBITRATION AWARD FOR ERRORS OF LAW OR FACT. IN ANY EVENT, THE ARBITRATORS WERE EXPRESSLY ASSIGNED THE TASK OF COST ALLOCATION AND THEIR DECISION IS RATIONALLY DRAWN. PETITIONER IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN CSR # 8189

LAW AND MOTION 301, PETITIONER SCHILLING ROBOTICS, INCORPORATED'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD AND ENTER JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. MOVING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN CSR # 8189
